nasb.text: Now Solomon loved the Lord, walking in the statutes of his father David, except he sacrificed and burned incense on the high places.

esv.text: Solomon loved the Lord, walking in the statutes of David his father, only he sacrificed and made offerings at the high places.

cnv.text: 所羅門愛耶和華，遵行他父親大衛的律例；只是他仍然在邱壇上宰殺和焚燒祭牲。

ccb.text: 所罗门爱耶和华，遵行他父亲大卫的律例，只是仍然在丘坛献祭烧香。
